summary_en: 1,110,000 shares (3.11% of S/O) acquired for ¥379.62M via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-15. Buyback program authorized 2026-05-14 at ¥410.4M ceiling (1,200,000 share limit) completed. Reason: capital efficiency and shareholder returns.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results of Treasury Stock via Self-dealing Off-exchange Trade (ToSTNeT-3) and Completion of Treasury Stock Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Aida Sekkei Co., Ltd. filed notice on 2026-05-15 confirming completion of a treasury stock acquisition program. The company purchased 1,110,000 shares (3.11% of outstanding shares) on 2026-05-15 for a total of ¥379.62 million via ToSTNeT-3 (Tokyo Stock Exchange off-exchange self-dealing trade). The acquisition was executed in full completion of the program authorized by board resolution on 2026-05-14, which had set an upper limit of 1,200,000 shares and ¥410.4 million. The company cited capital efficiency improvement and implementation of shareholder returns as the rationale for the buyback.
